name: @nexus-hems/ai-core
description: Unified local-first / hybrid AI orchestration layer for Nexus-HEMS
comment:deferredEngines: Local-LLM engines (WebLLM / Transformers.js / ONNX) are deferred and intentionally NOT shipped as dependencies (F-03 / ADR-029). To opt in, re-add the relevant package to dependencies here and set VITE_ENABLE_LOCAL_LLM. They are deliberately NOT declared as peerDependencies: this workspace runs auto-install-peers, which would reinstall the ~2.5 MB (38 packages) this PR removed.
